full_text:
Shi Chong (Jilun)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shi Chong, styledJilun, was born in Qingzhao. A schemer, fought against Wu and later robbed Jing merchants. Extravagant and ruthless. Shi Chong was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty. Shi Chong lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
